form.title: Testimonials Style 3 - Auto-Scroll Scroller
form.sampledata: {":type":"ja_ngr:testimonials","testimonials":{"jatools-layout-testimonials":"style-3","testimonials[testimonial-item]":{"testimonials[testimonial-item][text]":["You make the tough decision to consult the different approach, but help us move forward with bold steps. Huge thanks for your team. ","Very relaxing and thorough. Friendly staff will bring you awesome relaxation feeling the the moment you enter…Great prices as well. "],"testimonials[testimonial-item][author]":["Marsh W.","John D."],"rows":2,"cols":2,"type":"list"}}}

fieldset.name: Basic Settings
fieldset.description: Basic settings for the testimonials component

field.name: background-image
field.label: Background Image
field.description: Background image for the testimonials section
field.hint: Background image for the testimonials section. If not set, a default image will be used.

item.name: author
item.label: Testimonial Author
item.description: The name of the person giving the testimonial
